newProperties.name: features_auto_finalization
newProperties.description: Whether the cluster active logical version is advanced automatically once all nodes have been upgraded (true), or only in response to an explicit request via the Admin API (false). When false, the cluster remains able to downgrade to the previous version until finalization is requested. Setting this to false is an Enterprise feature and requires a valid license. Note: if upgrade was performed with this set to false and the cluster is ready to finalize, flipping this to true does not reliably trigger finalization. Leave this set to false and use the Admin API to finalize; once the upgrade is complete this can be set back to true to restore automatic finalization for future upgrades.
